hooks.command:
cd /Users/nam-yuseon/IdeaProjects/ysadmin || exit 0; git add -A 2>/dev/null; if git diff --cached --quiet; then exit 0; fi; names=$(git diff --cached --name-only); count=$(printf '%s
' "$names" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); preview=$(printf '%s
' "$names" | head -5 | tr '
' ',' | sed 's/,$//' | sed 's/,/, /g'); [ "$count" -gt 5 ] && preview="$preview, +$((count-5))"; git commit -m "auto: $preview"
